event: No history of obstructive sleep apnoea
Converted to emergency Roux-en-Y gastric bypass
Total thyroidectomy for a multinodular goitre
Transfer to intensive care at a tertiary hospital
Received all medication and nutrition intravenously
Euthyroidism achieved after gradual up titration
Intravenous calcitriol 1 µg alternate daily commenced
Additional intravenous calcitriol recommenced (1 µg alternate daily)
Maintenance schedule that controlled both hypocalcaemia and hypothyroidism established
Discharged on preoperative calcitriol dose 0.75 µg daily
Increased dose of calcium 1200 mg orally twice daily
